attributes.description: Granular consumer group analysis: lag by group, topic, and partition; member counts; offset progression. Drill-down for lag troubleshooting.

query.esql:
TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum IS NOT NULL AND attributes.group IS NOT NULL
| STATS lag = SUM(kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.group
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum IS NOT NULL AND attributes.group IS NOT NULL
| STATS lag = SUM(kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.group
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Lag Sum Over Time by Group

query.esql:
TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum IS NOT NULL AND attributes.group IS NOT NULL AND attributes.topic IS NOT NULL
| STATS lag_sum = SUM(kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum) BY attributes.group, attributes.topic
| EVAL group_topic = CONCAT(attributes.group, " / ", attributes.topic)
| STATS lag_sum = SUM(lag_sum) BY group_topic
| SORT lag_sum DESC
| LIMIT 20

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum IS NOT NULL AND attributes.group IS NOT NULL AND attributes.topic IS NOT NULL
| STATS lag_sum = SUM(kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum) BY attributes.group, attributes.topic
| EVAL group_topic = CONCAT(attributes.group, " / ", attributes.topic)
| STATS lag_sum = SUM(lag_sum) BY group_topic
| SORT lag_sum DESC
| LIMIT 20

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.members IS NOT NULL AND attributes.group IS NOT NULL
| STATS members = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(kafka.consumer_group.members)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.group
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.members IS NOT NULL AND attributes.group IS NOT NULL
| STATS members = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(kafka.consumer_group.members)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.group
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag IS NOT NULL AND attributes.group IS NOT NULL AND attributes.topic IS NOT NULL AND attributes.partition IS NOT NULL
| STATS lag = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.lag) BY attributes.group, attributes.topic, attributes.partition
| SORT lag DESC
| LIMIT 50

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag IS NOT NULL AND attributes.group IS NOT NULL AND attributes.topic IS NOT NULL AND attributes.partition IS NOT NULL
| STATS lag = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.lag) BY attributes.group, attributes.topic, attributes.partition
| SORT lag DESC
| LIMIT 50

embeddableConfig.content:
## [Kafka OTel] Consumer Groups

Consumer lag and offset drill-down:
- Lag sum per group and topic
- Lag by partition (hot partitions)
- Member count per group
- Offset position vs current partition offset

query.esql:
TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_lag = SUM(kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_lag = SUM(kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum IS NOT NULL
| STATS lag_sum = SUM(kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum) BY attributes.group
| WHERE lag_sum > 0
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum IS NOT NULL
| STATS lag_sum = SUM(kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum) BY attributes.group
| WHERE lag_sum > 0
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.members IS NOT NULL
| STATS members = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.members) BY attributes.group
| WHERE members == 0
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.members IS NOT NULL
| STATS members = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.members) BY attributes.group
| WHERE members == 0
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

attributes.title: [Kafka OTel] Consumer Groups
